title: daucus muricatus var. maritimus
intro: Daucus muricatus var. maritimus, also known as sea carrot, is a variety of the Daucus carota plant, specifically adapted to grow in coastal areas and characterized by its thickened taproot. The medicinal properties of sea carrot include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of using sea carrot include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and even support the immune system. Herbal preparations of sea carrot include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
